click.description: Click command decorators that expose executable command-line entry points.

cli_command.description: Executable leaf commands registered with Click.

command.description: Register a function as an executable Click command.
command.notes: Detects executable leaf command functions decorated with @click.command or @cli.command when Click is imported. The @click.group/@cli.group definitions are not emitted, and no command-to-group hierarchy is traced. Parameter/helper decorators are excluded. Receiver provenance for @cli.command is not traced beyond the file-level Click import guard.
